compiled_state.title: Contract: Update RED_TEST_WRITER_OUTPUT with Format 3 (no_new_tests_needed) and clarify evaluator bypass
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add Format 3 (TEST_RESULT:no_new_tests_needed) to the RED_TEST_WRITER_OUTPUT contract and update the RED_TEST_EVALUATOR_VERDICT contract to explicitly state evaluator bypass for this output.

### Steps
1. Add Format 3 to `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md`:
   - TEST_RESULT:no_new_tests_needed
   - REASON: enum (green_classified | existing_coverage_sufficient)
   - EXISTING_TESTS: optional, comma-separated test file paths
   - Add example output for each REASON value
   - Update the "Emitter" section to describe the three-way output (written / no_new_tests_needed / rejected)
2. Update `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-evaluator-verdict.md`:
   - In the "Relationship to RED_TEST_WRITER_OUTPUT Contract" section, add: "TEST_RESULT:no_new_tests_needed also bypasses the evaluator — the orchestrator accepts it as a success signal without invoking evaluation"
   - Ensure the Parser section clarifies: evaluator is only invoked on TEST_RESULT:rejected

### Unit Test Exemption (Gate 2 justified)
Documentation infeasibility — contract docs define schemas with no runtime behavior. Only structural validation (section existence) is possible.

### File Impact
- `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md` — Edit
- `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-evaluator-verdict.md` — Edit

## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Contract doc contains Format 3 with no_new_tests_needed
  Verify: grep -q "no_new_tests_needed" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md
- [ ] Contract doc contains REASON enum values
  Verify: grep -q "green_classified" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-writer-output.md
- [ ] Evaluator contract clarifies bypass for no_new_tests_needed
  Verify: grep -q "no_new_tests_needed" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-evaluator-verdict.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Implementation complete. Changes: (1) red-test-writer-output.md — added Format 3 (TEST_RESULT:no_new_tests_needed) with REASON enum (green_classified | existing_coverage_sufficient), EXISTING_TESTS optional field, evaluator bypass note, and two example outputs; updated Emitter section to describe three-way output; updated Parser section to note bypass; updated exit code table and failure contract. (2) red-test-evaluator-verdict.md — updated Relationship section to explicitly name both bypass cases (written + no_new_tests_needed); updated Parser section to state evaluator is only invoked on TEST_RESULT:rejected. ✓
